headline: __ Adding to what said — and he said it well. I want to give some longer context...

headline: Hi everyone, We know there’s been some confusion around equity, especially due t...
quote: Hi everyone, We know there’s been some confusion around equity, especially due to limited communication in the past. We want to improve transparency here. headline: I agree with you — this situation did not meet our standards. We made a mistake ...
